identity.canonical_title: Switches Discretely Your Addressability You Relation

theory.canonical_statement: ID5618 records Switches Discretely Your Addressability You Relation as a source-extracted canonical equation.
theory.technical_interpretation: The entry preserves the equation exactly as extracted from `00_Engine\Lemma-Maker\Prism\main.tex` for registry alignment and later derivation.

latex_blocks: $ switches discretely (your 360A--360 addressability), you get \textbf{mode-jumps} and structured fold steps. \end{itemize} A simple explicit choice is \begin{equation} \hat{\bm{n}}(t)=\bigl(\sin\Theta(t)\cos\Phi(t),\;\sin\Theta(t)\sin\Phi(t),\;\cos\Theta(t)\bigr), \end{equation} with $
